aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期（2026年6月）因宏观回调、利率担忧及媒体负面叙事，组合中光子学与机器人相关股票大幅下跌，但整体信念未减，反而视此为加仓机会。
representative_quotes: Just dropping these 3 slides from Agility Robotics ( $CCXI ) presentations. For the US robotic program doomposters... Just eyeballing the graph, looks like <$30k BOM mass production.
This market feels like an ADHD goldfish with a 5 second attention span, trading popular themes. It's like markets only care about physical AI and energy right now?
There's a global correction right now, no clue when it stops... From personal experience, high beta stocks get hit a lot harder, but usually frontrun index drops.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期重点关注特朗普金融披露中的潜在利益冲突及市场脆弱信号，从之前偏向AI投资转向警惕泡沫和衰退。
representative_quotes: BREAKING: Look at this...The day before Trump paused tariffs...his accounts purchased 327 stocks worth up to $12.8 million. The trades were disclosed more than a year late, resulting in a $200 penalty. Unusual.
7 out of 10 market peak indicators have now been triggered, per Bank of America
Half of investors have reduced their portfolio risk, while 62% expect a recession and 71% worry market volatility will hurt their finances.

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 从早期只重仓海力士，近期明显加仓康宁GLW和半导体设备股，认为康宁有10倍业绩潜力，并开始看好日月光等封测股，但底仓仍以海力士为主。
representative_quotes: 存储这波不仅卡住了AI的脖子，也卡了传统电子产品的脖子。存储涨完什么涨？当然还是存储涨！
康宁最大的魅力在于未来的确定性。英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，那么在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！
AI有泡沫，但AI没有丝滑的取代所有白领的工作前就不可能破。路途遥远。
